name: conversion-copywriting
description: Generate conversion-optimized page copy using VOC research, competitor insights, and proven structures. Use when creating or revising landing pages, service pages, or marketing content.
capabilities: Generate landing page copy following proven homepage, services, and about page structures
Incorporate voice of customer (VOC) research quotes for authentic customer language
Create verifiable claims backed by business consistency data and public records
Adapt tone and voice to match target audience (conversational, professional, or friendly)
Provide uniqueness scores and verification reports for every generated piece
Replace marketing jargon with clear, customer-centric language
author: CleanExpo
securitySummary: All static findings are false positives. The skill contains only documentation (SKILL.md) with zero executable code. Detected patterns (hash references, numbered lists) are benign metadata and markdown content.
valueStatement: Marketing copy often fails because it uses generic language and makes unverifiable claims. This skill generates conversion-optimized page copy that speaks directly to customer pain points using verified VOC research and proven copywriting structures.
limitations: Does not access external websites or APIs for competitive data
Does not generate images or visual content
Does not publish content directly to platforms
Requires VOC research input for authentic customer voice

useCases.title: Create High-Converting Landing Pages
useCases.description: Generate complete homepage or services page copy with hero sections, value propositions, testimonials, and CTAs that follow conversion-optimized structures.

useCases.targetUser: Conversion rate optimization specialists, digital marketers
useCases.title: Rewrite Underperforming Pages
useCases.description: Revise existing page content to improve conversion rates by replacing jargon with customer language and adding verifiable claims.

useCases.title: Generate Marketing Email and Ad Copy
useCases.description: Create short-form marketing copy for email campaigns, ads, and proposals that maintains brand voice and drives action.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Landing Page Copy
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate homepage copy for a [business type] that serves [target audience]. Key customer pain points: [pain points]. Include: hero headline using VOC language, 3 value propositions, 2 testimonials, 5-step process, and CTA. Tone: [conversational/professional/friendly].
promptTemplates.scenario: Creating a new homepage from scratch

promptTemplates.title: Services Page with VOC Integration
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a services page for [service name]. Use these customer quotes from VOC research: [quotes]. Structure: hero, services overview, deep-dive for top 3 services, process, proof testimonials, CTA. Avoid jargon from the banned list.
promptTemplates.scenario: Building a services page with authentic customer voice

promptTemplates.title: About Page with Credentials
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate an about page. Company story: [story]. Team: [team info]. Values: [values]. Credentials: [licenses/certs]. Verify all credential claims against business data. Tone: [professional/friendly].
promptTemplates.scenario: Creating an authentic about page with verified claims

promptTemplates.title: Conversion Audit and Rewrite
promptTemplates.prompt: Audit this existing copy for conversion issues: [paste copy]. Identify: jargon to remove, weak claims, missing proof elements, unclear CTAs. Rewrite following best practices with 95%+ uniqueness.

bestPractices: Always provide VOC research quotes to ensure authentic customer voice in generated copy
Verify business facts (credentials, awards, statistics) before including in claims
Replace banned marketing jargon with clear, customer-centric language
antiPatterns: Using generic marketing buzzwords without specific supporting claims
Making credential claims without verifying against business data
Ignoring customer voice in favor of company-focused language

faq.question: What inputs does this skill need to work effectively?
faq.answer: Provide VOC research data (customer quotes), business consistency information (NAP, credentials), and target audience details. More context produces better results.

faq.question: Can this skill generate SEO-optimized content?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill generates meta titles (50-60 chars) and meta descriptions (150-160 chars) as part of the output format.

faq.question: How does the verification process work?
faq.answer: Every output includes a verification report with uniqueness score, verified claims count, and any unverified claim warnings.

faq.question: What tone options are available?
faq.answer: Conversational (default, friendly), Professional (for B2B, legal, medical, finance), and Friendly (for consumer services).

faq.question: Does this skill integrate with other tools?
faq.answer: Yes, it references VOC Research Skill, Competitor Analysis Skill, and Business Consistency Skill for data integration.

faq.question: What output formats are supported?
faq.answer: The skill outputs structured JSON with page type, meta tags, sections array, and verification metrics.
